arts.ttl: 'I have to believe' - Norwich boss refuses to quit play-off push
arts.sum: Johannes Hoff Thorup says he wouldn't be doing his job right if he gave up on Norwich City's Championship play-off push.

arts.ttl: Preview: Norwich City vs. West Bromwich Albion - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Norwich City and West Bromwich Albion, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Maja, Styles, Wallace - Tony Mowbray issues West Brom fitness update as 'reality' bites - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Albion boss Mowbray said: "A few didn’t train today (Thursday) because they got back last night (Wednesday) so it’s like second day of recovery. The likes of Torbjorn Heggem, Mikey Johnston, Grady Diangana and Isaac Price have been representing their countries ahead of a tough trip to Norwich this weekend.
